preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.3.0: Brain upgrade — Merlin's instructions are now 56% leaner (faster cold start, lower token cost) with new statistical winner test, copy quality gate, conversion rubric, and SEO scoring framework. On-demand reference files are now distributed to existing users via /update.
whatsNew: Faster cold start — merlin.md trimmed from 45KB to 20KB by moving on-demand content into reference files (loaded only when needed)
New Promotion Gate: stat-test before scaling winners (p<0.05 AND ≥15% lift) — no more scaling on noise
New Copy Quality Gate: 7-expert panel scoring with AI-detector weighting and banned-vocabulary list before any ad copy ships
Conversion Rubric: 8-dimension landing page audit applied automatically when you ask Merlin why ads aren't converting
SEO Rubric: Impact×Confidence keyword scoring with BOFU/MOFU/TOFU classifier and striking-distance band (positions 4-20)
Cold-email benchmarks (40% open / 3% reply / 1% positive) and email attribution model picker (first-touch / linear / time-decay) wired into email audit
Routing fix: existing users now receive merlin-platforms.md and merlin-setup.md on /update (previously only shipped via fresh installer)
